emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: RE: good morning great work out the market is nuts today i like the rug and we can buy it just do not want to pay the 2800 talk laters luv you dq To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: RE: good morning the day is already bad, the NYMEX had a bomb threat and they evacuated ILY dq To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: RE: good morning where are you at now baby ILY dq To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: good morning
emails.body: good morning how low can it go??yikes our stock Spoke to Linda's assistant today and told her we wanted to know what rent was running for the other similar townhouses and also what a purchase price would be- she does not know and said that she gave Linda my message from last time as well as this time but that she is not taking any calls.... this is the best I can do... ily kq

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: RE: good morning it is heading south alright all of the options are out of the money so it really does not matter ok on the rest we need to talk about the living arrangement and see what we think as too do we want to buy or jsut rent can we talk tonight To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: Actually I have thought about and I would prefer to just rent. I look forward to purchasing a house in future or something substantially bigger. From an investment perspective- I think we will have other opportunities in future. we can talk tonite too if you want ily kay To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: ok To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: I LOVE YOU To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: I LOVE YOU TOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO if you need to reach me -just page me 8775104370- actually i think you can email too you just put to 8775104370@skytel.com I will be in meeting until 5:30 starting now To: Quigley, Dutch

emails.subject: Good Morning
emails.body: a message to us from MOM Forwarded by Kay Quigley/HOU/EES on 10/31/2001 02:35 PM "Raymond Okafor" <offshoreworks@skannet.com> on 10/31/2001 03:42:21 AM Please respond to "Raymond Okafor" <offshoreworks@skannet.com>

emails.subject: RE: Good Morning
emails.body: RE: Good Morning I just want you to know that i am sorry for everything that i have done Kay I love you and i want to be your husband forever ILY Dutch PS I have changed my work number having my cell phone changed not talked to her when she called and will work on the last thing

emails.subject: RE: Good Morning
emails.body: RE: Good Morning thks kq

emails.subject: Good Morning
emails.body: Good Morning Just wanted to let you know that i am thinking of you ILY dq

emails.subject: Re: Good Morning
emails.body: Re: Good Morning I did get your page From: Dutch Quigley/ENRON@enronXgate on 11/02/2001 09:44 AM

emails.subject: good morning
emails.body: good morning Good morning, I LOVE YOU KAY dq

emails.subject: Re: good morning
emails.body: Re: good morning ILY TOO- I hope little Rex is okay- I will go at lunch and check on him From: Dutch Quigley/ENRON@enronXgate on 11/12/2001 08:43 AM

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: RE: good morning did he bark much when i left

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: only for 10 minutes

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: thats good he is getting better this plane crash is crazy in new york give me a call when you get a chance just to say hi dq

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: so does this mean we to take a photo with us and rex for x-mas cards... ILY dq

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: hey honey if you are making appointments can you get me a massage on sat morning around 8 9 if possible if not at that time i just want go in and use the spa and get ready down there Love you baby dq

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: ok

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: okay- we're set for 80 minute desert hot stone massages at 8am Sat morning hopefully that's not too early- but it will be 10am Houston time so we should not be too sleepy of course assuming we are not all nite gambling!! he he

emails.subject: RE: good morning
emails.body: that is true luv ya babe

emails.subject: Good Morning
emails.body: ILY honey!! a note from Mom below-sound like Dad is doing well at work Forwarded by Kay Quigley/HOU/EES on 11/15/2001 09:53 AM "Raymond Okafor" <offshoreworks@skannet.com> on 11/15/2001 09:31:01 AM Please respond to "Raymond Okafor" <offshoreworks@skannet.com>
